completion_summary: Delivered chemworld_duty_limited_distillation_vnext as a professional-candidate runtime replacement proposal for vle_shortcut_distillation, with bubble and thermal gates, equipment/duty-limited cut solving, material and energy ledgers, binary Fenske-Underwood-Gilliland diagnostics, 29 dedicated tests, an auditable provider contract and adapter manifest, and a passing full local release gate (885 passed, 11 skipped). Left v0.3 runtime, tasks, scoring, golden evidence, and shared integration paths unchanged for WF-110.
notes: No edits to existing separations.py, separation cards, flash/concentration modules, runtime distillation services, tasks.py, World Law, task cuts/thresholds, scoring, golden trajectories, or benchmark evidence. WF-110 alone integrates and removes the old provider after state mapping and benchmark refreeze.
scope: Deliver an equipment-, bubble-point-, and duty-limited constant-relative-volatility distillation runtime provider with sensible/reboiler/condenser energy, internal vapor traffic, cut feasibility, Fenske distribution closure, conditional binary Underwood diagnostics, and a vNext replacement proposal for vle_shortcut_distillation.
